The positive stance affirms the research firm’s confidence in the company’s outlook despite the stock declining by over 50% over the past […]

headline: 53% of Americans fear AI could take their jobs, poll finds
summary: More than half of respondents in an Reuters/Ipsos poll said that they feared AI technology could cost someone in their household a job.
